summary: Split the Senior Capstone QoL cadence from ten compound 3x/day automations into thirty app-managed single-slot automations after Bryan reported that multiple daily times inside one automation were not reliably firing.
scope: Project-only automation maintenance for the Senior Capstone QoL 3x/day cadence.

before.shape: ten automations with three BYHOUR values each

after.shape: thirty automations with one BYHOUR value each

validation: Live registry listed 30 active Senior Capstone QoL automation TOMLs after app-managed update/create calls.
Each active QoL RRULE now has exactly one BYHOUR value.
powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-automation-contract.ps1 -RepoRoot . -RequireLive passed for 30 QoL automations and 2 support automations.

powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\measure-automation-efficiency.ps1 -RepoRoot . -Days 30 reported 30 active QoL automations, 30 starts/day, 900 starts/30 days, and 48-minute minimum spacing.
self_improvement: Updated the automation config and contract checker to enforce the new single-slot shape so future audits do not recreate compound 3x/day schedules.
next_action: Keep 30 starts/day stable and use accepted-pass telemetry before recommending any further cadence change.
